summary: Accepted the M7 platform, resolution, and localization matrix after independent QA ACCEPT and lead integration gates. The accepted evidence adds observable Playwright matrix coverage and a JSON fixture for Chromium-supported browser/resolution/localization rows plus Windows desktop smoke evidence. Edge, Firefox, and Windows DPI 150% remain explicit blocked-by-tooling/follow-up rows and must be carried into M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 before any full platform coverage claim.

Task registry listed; current task REVIEW before lead accept.
No READY stdout while this task is active.

tests_run.result: shape-ok M7-PLATFORM-RESOLUTION-LOCALIZATION-MATRIX-001 REVIEW 4 supported scenarios, 3 unsupported rows.
Diff limited to allowed tests and process/task/message/state files.

diff keyword scan for Electron/network/cloud/telemetry/account terms
tests_run.result: No product boundary expansion; matches limited to process text and Playwright test fixture loader context.
Passed; Vite build completed with existing >500k chunk warnings.
Passed; Storybook build completed with existing chunk warning.
Passed; Chromium 23/23 tests passed, including the new platform matrix fixture test.
Passed; Electron security preferences, preload bridge, renderer navigation restriction, and IPC allowlist verified.
Passed; format, lint, typecheck, and architecture checks passed.

decisions: Accept QA status=ACCEPT and advance task to ACCEPTED pending PR CI and main integration.
Accept this as truthful matrix evidence, not full cross-browser enablement.
Carry Edge, Firefox, and Windows DPI 150% unresolved rows into M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001; do not claim them passed without new tooling/evidence.
Accept zh-CN expectedLang normalization for zh-Hans visible locale labels as consistent with current locale policy.

No Human Gate is active; this task does not add release, telemetry, accounts, cloud-save, server/multiplayer, manual node battle, commercial, branding, sim-rule, content fact, or save migration scope.
risks: M7-PLATFORM-EDGE-FIREFOX-UNRESOLVED: Edge and Firefox are blocked by current Playwright tooling and remain unresolved rows.
M7-WINDOWS-DPI-150-UNRESOLVED: Windows DPI 150% is not directly exercised by current tooling and remains a follow-up row.
M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 must decide whether these unresolved rows are acceptable scoped follow-ups, defects, or blockers.
requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, then close M7-PLATFORM-RESOLUTION-LOCALIZATION-MATRIX-001 after origin/main contains accepted changes.
